description: This file defines the AuthController class, a Spring Boot REST controller responsible for handling authentication-related endpoints such as registration, login, email verification, and resending verification emails. It interacts with the AuthService component to perform business logic and manages HTTP request processing and response generation.

classes.name: AuthController
classes.description: A REST controller class for managing authentication endpoints.

methods.name: register
methods.description: Handles user registration requests, invoking authService to register and returning appropriate responses.

methods.name: login
methods.description: Processes user login attempts, checking credentials and email verification status.

methods.name: resendVerification
methods.description: Resends email verification links to unverified users.

methods.name: verify
methods.description: Confirms user email verification via token consumption.

methods.name: extractIp
methods.description: Utility method to extract client IP address from HttpServletRequest.
